narrative:
Wayne County has 68,613 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.8% of registrants.
